# Quantum Leap Ventures

> AI-native software development studio specializing in shipping production-ready, LLM-powered web applications.

## About

Quantum Leap Ventures is a software company founded by Saravanan Vijayakumar. We specialize in Vibe Coding — using Claude, OpenAI, and Gemini as core development tools to move fast and deliver real products.

## Services

- LLM-powered web application development
- AI Agents with tool-calling and RAG pipelines
- Full-stack development (Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Python)
- Cloud-native architecture (GCP Cloud Run, Cloud SQL, Docker)
- Data pipelines and automation
- Performance testing and optimization

## Products

- Vibe Coding App Builder: AI-native development service for shipping production-ready applications

## Portfolio

- SuburbIntel (https://suburbintel.com) — Property analytics platform with LLM-powered suburb insights
- PDFEdit4U (https://pdfedit4u.com) — Production-ready PDF editing tool (merge, compress)

## Pricing

- Starter: $2,499 per project — MVPs, landing pages, 1-2 week delivery
- Pro: $5,999 per project — Full apps with AI integrations, 3-4 week delivery
- Enterprise: $12,999+ per project — Complex AI platforms, RAG, agents, 6-8 week delivery
